sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68790" key="*morfeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Μορφεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <title_ TEIform="title">Morpheus</title_>, son of Sleep, god of dreams, so called because of the <sense id="n68790.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forms</tr_> he calls up before the sleeper, Ov.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Met.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.635</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
